title: Financial Data Analyst (Flight Plan, FP&A, Marketing Analytics)
description: About DarkroomDarkroom is a technology-driven growth marketing firm focused on growth-stage consumer companies. We were founded in 2017 out of a conviction that the iconic ad agencies of tomorrow would look very different. Darkroom is a human services firm built on a universal AI commerce layer called Shadow.
